summary: Iteration 31: Testing bug fix for embedded document viewer (iframe) in published article view and new 'Dokument einbetten' button feature. All 15 tests passed - 100% success rate.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Tiptap console warning about duplicate extension names ['link', 'underline'] - not blocking but should be investigated
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: (1) BUG FIX: EmbeddedDocument.jsx renderHTML now outputs full HTML with iframe structure including data-embedded-document wrapper, header with filename/open link, and iframe element. (2) ArticleView.jsx has contentRef on content div and useEffect that post-processes embedded documents by finding div[data-embedded-document] elements and injecting iframe viewer HTML. (3) NEW FEATURE: 'Dokument einbetten' button (FileInput icon) added to RichTextEditor toolbar with data-testid='doc-import-btn'. (4) Document import dialog opens with search, folder browsing, and embed/link options. (5) 'Einfügemodus' section shows when document is selected with 'Einbetten (Viewer)' and 'Link einfügen' radio options. (6) Info box appears when embed mode is selected. (7) Home navigation item correctly displayed in sidebar (not Dashboard).

login_and_navigation.details: Login works, navigation to articles and editor works

doc_import_button_in_toolbar.details: FileInput icon button with data-testid='doc-import-btn' found in editor toolbar

doc_import_folder_browsing.details: Breadcrumb navigation with 'Dokumente' root and folder list displayed

doc_import_einfugemodus_section.details: 'Einfügemodus' label appears when document is selected

doc_import_embed_info_box.details: Info box with text 'Das Dokument wird als interaktiver Viewer direkt im Artikel eingebettet' appears when embed mode selected

embedded_document_renderHTML.details: Code review: EmbeddedDocument.jsx renderHTML (line 98-113) outputs full HTML with iframe structure

article_view_contentRef.details: Code review: ArticleView.jsx has contentRef (line 123) on content div (line 526)

article_view_useEffect_postprocess.details: Code review: ArticleView.jsx useEffect (line 131-153) post-processes div[data-embedded-document] elements and injects iframe viewer HTML

backend_health.details: API health check returns status ok, version 2.0.0

general_app_navigation.details: Login, dashboard, articles list, and editor all load correctly
